    A

    addNewMediaNetwork(List<Media>) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
    Adds new media from the network to the in-memory list, skipping duplicates by ID.
    addNotify() - Method in class martin.viewtool.ui.PanelManagement
     
    Alerts - Class in martin.viewtool.ui
     
    audioOnly() - Method in record class martin.viewtool.core.DownloadRequest
    Returns the value of the audioOnly record component.

    B

    blobNameGuid - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Media
    Unique blob GUID used for cloud storage.
    blobUrl - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Media
    Public URL to the media blob in cloud storage.
    BOLD_FONT - Static variable in class martin.viewtool.utils.UIUtils
    Bold Segoe UI font at size 13.

    C

    comboFilterListener() - Method in class martin.viewtool.ui.PanelManagement
     
    confirm(Component, String, String) - Static method in class martin.viewtool.ui.Alerts
    Shows a Yes/No confirmation dialog.
    createMediaListCombined() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
    Builds a combined list of network media plus any local-only files not present on the network.

    D

    dateOfBirth - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Usuari
    Date of birth.
    delete(MediaItem) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaLibrary
    Deletes a media file from disk.
    deleteMedia(Media) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.ManagementService
    Deletes the local copy of a media file.
    deleteToken() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.TokenService
    Deletes the token file from disk.
    download(DownloadRequest, Appendable, IntConsumer) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.YtDlpService
    Executes yt-dlp with the parameters defined in the request.
    DownloadController - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Coordinates validation and execution of media downloads via YtDlpService.
    DownloadController(YtDlpService) - Constructor for class martin.viewtool.core.DownloadController
    Creates a new DownloadController backed by the given service.
    downloadedFromUrl - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Media
    Original URL the media was downloaded from.
    downloadMedia(Media, MediaSyncPolling, String) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.ManagementService
    Downloads a network media file to the local download directory.
    DownloadRequest - Record Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Holds all parameters needed to start a yt-dlp download.
    DownloadRequest(URI, MediaFormat, boolean, Path, String, boolean) - Constructor for record class martin.viewtool.core.DownloadRequest
    Creates an instance of a DownloadRequest record class.

    email - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Usuari
    Email address of the user.

    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    Shows an error dialog.

    Filters a media list by file name.

    G

    getApiUrl() - Method in class martin.viewtool.ui.ViewToolApp
    Returns the base URL of the remote API.

    Returns the MediaSyncPolling component used for network sync.
    getDate() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaItem
     
    getDownloadBaseDir() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
    Returns the base download directory, creating it if it does not exist.
    getExt() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaItem
     
    getFile(int) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaTableModel
    Returns the Media object for the given row in the current page.
    getFiles() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.LibraryService
    Returns all media files found in the download directory.
    getFilteredFiles(String) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.LibraryService
    Returns media files filtered by type.
    getFixedSizeIcon(String, int, int) - Method in class martin.viewtool.utils.UIUtils
    Loads an image from the /images/ classpath resource folder and scales it to the specified dimensions.
    getLimitSpeed() - Method in class martin.viewtool.config.PreferencesService
    Returns the saved download speed limit, or an empty string if not set.
    getLocalFile(Media) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
    Resolves the expected local File for the given media.
    getMimeType() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaItem
     
    getName() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaItem
     
    getNetworkMediaAll() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
    Returns a copy of all network media loaded.
    getOutputDir() - Method in class martin.viewtool.config.PreferencesService
    Returns the saved output directory, creating it if it does not exist.
    getPath() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaItem
     
    getRowCount() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaTableModel
     
    getSizeBytes() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaItem
     
    getTableCellRendererComponent(JTable, Object, boolean, boolean, int, int) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaRowRenderer
    Returns the renderer component with the appropriate background colour.
    getToken() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.TokenService
    Returns the token, reading it from disk.
    getTokenService() - Method in class martin.viewtool.ui.ViewToolApp
    Returns the TokenService used to persist and read the auth token.
    getUpdatedLocalListModel(String) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.ManagementService
    Returns a DefaultListModel populated with the names of locally filtered media files.
    getUserNames() - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaTableModel
     
    getValueAt(int, int) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaTableModel
     
    getYtDlpPath() - Method in class martin.viewtool.config.PreferencesService
    Returns the saved yt-dlp path, defaulting to "yt-dlp"

    Returns the value of the m3uFile record component.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class martin.viewtool.ViewTool
    Starts the ViewTool application.
    ManagementService - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Service that handles operations on media files: listing, deleting, downloading from the network, uploading, and opening locally.

    Creates a new ManagementService.

    mediaFileName - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Media
    File name of the media.
    MediaFormat - Enum Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Supported media output formats for downloads.
    MediaItem - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Immutable representation of a local media file on disk.

    Creates a new MediaItem.
    MediaLibrary - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Scans a local directory and builds a list of MediaItem objects.

    mediaMimeType - Variable in class martin.viewtool.core.Media
    MIME type of the media file.

    MediaRowRenderer() - Constructor for class martin.viewtool.core.MediaRowRenderer
     
    MediaService - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Manages the in-memory list of network media and provides utilities for resolving local file paths and combining local and network media lists.
    MediaService() - Constructor for class martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
     
    MediaTableModel - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Table model that combines network media from the API and local files.

    Creates a new MediaTableModel.
    MP3 - Enum constant in enum class martin.viewtool.core.MediaFormat
    Audio-only MP3 format.
    MP4 - Enum constant in enum class martin.viewtool.core.MediaFormat
    Video MP4 format.

    Plain Segoe UI font at size 13.
    playLastDownloaded(Path) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.PlayService
    Finds the newest MP4, MP3, or M4A file in the given directory and opens it.
    PlayService - Class in martin.viewtool.core
    Opens the most recently downloaded media file with the system default player.
    PlayService() - Constructor for class martin.viewtool.core.PlayService

    Throws IllegalArgumentException if the string is null or blank.

    Validates a download speed limit value.

    Parses and validates a URL string.

    Runs a command, streams its output to out, and reports progress.

    S

    saveToken(String) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.TokenService
    Saves the given token to disk.
    scan(Path) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.MediaLibrary
    Scans a directory and returns all regular files sorted by date descending.

    Adds a mouse listener to the button that switches the cursor to a hand when the pointer enters the button area.
    setLimitSpeed(String) - Method in class martin.viewtool.config.PreferencesService
    Saves the download speed limit.

    setOutputDir(Path) - Method in class martin.viewtool.config.PreferencesService
    Saves the output directory for downloads.
    setToken(String) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.TokenService
    Sets the in memory token.
    setYtDlpPath(Path) - Method in class martin.viewtool.config.PreferencesService
    Saves the path to the yt-dlp executable.
    showException(Component, Throwable) - Static method in class martin.viewtool.ui.Alerts
    Shows an error dialog with the exception message.
    showFeedback(JLabel, String, boolean) - Method in class martin.viewtool.utils.UIUtils
    Displays a temporary feedback message on a label and clears it after 5 seconds.
    showMainAndManagement(JPanel, JPanel) - Method in class martin.viewtool.ui.ViewToolApp
    Displays the main panel at the top and the management panel below it.
    startDownload(String, MediaFormat, boolean, Path, Appendable, IntConsumer, String, boolean) - Method in class martin.viewtool.core.DownloadController
    Validates inputs and starts a download via yt-dlp.

    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Y
